slides.title: The tiny seed that *works hard* for your heart.
slides.sub: Ground flaxseed quietly packs three nutrients linked to a healthier heart. Here is why it earns a spot in your day.

slides.title: Three nutrients, one seed
slides.body: Ground flaxseed brings lignans, plant omega-3 ALA and soluble fiber together. That combination *can support* a healthy heart.

slides.title: Lignans, the plant compound
slides.body: Lignans are plant polyphenols with antioxidant activity. Diets rich in them *are linked to* healthier blood vessels over time.

slides.title: Omega-3, the plant kind
slides.body: Flax is one of the richest plant sources of ALA, an omega-3 fat that *may help* support a healthy heart.

slides.title: Fiber that does more
slides.body: Soluble fiber binds cholesterol in the gut. A couple of tablespoons daily *can support* healthy cholesterol and blood pressure.

slides.title: Grind it, don't whole it
slides.body: Whole flaxseeds often pass through undigested. *Ground flaxseed* unlocks the lignans, omega-3 and fiber your body can actually use.

slides.title: Small habits, *one clear number*.
slides.body: Vibe Health logs the food, sleep, movement and steps behind your heart, and turns them into one daily Health Score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
A spoonful of ground flaxseed is one of the easiest heart-healthy habits out there. 🌿💚

Lignans, plant omega-3 ALA and soluble fiber work together to support healthy cholesterol and blood pressure. Just remember to grind it first. Save this for your next grocery run. 🔖

Vibe Health turns small habits like this into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Ground Flaxseed Is a Heart-Health Powerhouse
